prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次分别为约19820→22583→23444→19998→37957名。2021–2024年位次在2万名上下波动，2025年因专业组全部调整为"首选物理，再选化学"且新增中美121双学位项目，最低位次骤降至约37957名，较2024年后移约17959名；该校在福建省物理类招生计划：2021年16人、2022年17人、2023年16人、2024年16人、2025年16人；2026年计划增至24人，较2025年扩招50%，扩招幅度较大，对位次有后移压力。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 东北农业大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年约第120名，近年排名在116–122名之间波动，整体层次稳定；2026年声誉评价为中性/混合，未见明显负面舆情；抖音热度排名第95，评价为"一般"，短视频平台曝光量较低；历史投档异常记录中未见该校断档信号，报考心理较为平稳；第五轮学科评估中，食品科学与工程获评A-，为该校唯一A-及以上学科，与招生专业中的食品科学与工程类直接对应，对相关专业报考有一定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 2026年专业热度数据显示，电气工程及其自动化、电子信息/通信、计算机类为高热推荐专业，该校2026年新增电气工程及其自动化、物联网工程、计算机科学与技术（中美121）等热门工科专业，有望吸引更高分段考生；福建省2026年普通高考总人数约267900人，按近年比例估算物理类约203800人，较2025年192096人增加约6.1%，考生规模扩大使竞争略有加剧；东北农业大学位于黑龙江省哈尔滨市，在福建省招生占比极低（2025年约0.45%），地域距离较远，福建考生报考意愿受地域偏好影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次因专业组调整而大幅后移的基准、2026年扩招50%带来的位次后移压力、新增热门工科专业对高分考生的吸引力、以及福建省物理类考生增加约6%带来的竞争加剧，考虑专业优化对位次的回调作用，预测2026年物理类最低位次约49144名，区间48644–49644名。

- 物联网工程。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间48644–49644名内，建议以二档专业为主力填报、一档专业冲刺、三档专业保底。位次明显优于区间下限（如48600以内）可重点冲刺电气工程及其自动化、物联网工程等热门工科专业；位次接近区间上限（如49600左右）应以三档专业保底为主。注意中美121双学位项目有出国留学要求，非英语语种考生需慎重考虑。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 19820 → 22583 → 23444 → 19998 → 37957. Rankings fluctuated around 20,000 from 2021 to 2024. In 2025, due to all major groups being adjusted to "First choice Physics, then Chemistry" and the addition of the Sino-American 121 Dual Degree Program, the minimum ranking sharply dropped to about 37957, moving back by about 17959 places compared to 2024. The university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Fujian Province: 16 in 2021, 17 in 2022, 16 in 2023, 16 in 2024, 16 in 2025; in 2026, the plan increases to 24, a 50% expansion compared to 2025, which is a significant increase and puts downward pressure on rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Northeast Agricultural University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Ranking, it is approximately 120th, with recent rankings fluctuating between 116 and 122, indicating a stable overall level. The 2026 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, with no significant negative public opinion. Douyin popularity ranking is 95th, rated as "average," with low exposure on short video platforms. No signs of admission breaks have been seen in historical filing anomalies, and the application psychology is relatively stable. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Food Science and Engineering was rated A-, the only A- or above discipline at the university, directly corresponding to the Food Science and Engineering category in the enrollment majors, which has some appeal for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: 2026 major popularity data shows that Electrical Engineering and Automation, Electronic Information/Communication, and Computer Science are highly recommended hot majors. In 2026, the university added popular engineering majors such as Electrical Engineering and Automation, Internet of Things Engineering, and Computer Science and Technology (Sino-American 121), which are expected to attract higher-scoring candidates. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Fujian Province general college entrance examination is about 267,900, with an estimated 203,800 in the Physics Category based on recent proportions, an increase of about 6.1% compared to 192,096 in 2025, intensifying competition due to the expanded candidate pool. Northeast Agricultural University is located in Harbin, Heilongjiang Province, with a very low enrollment proportion in Fujian Province (about 0.45% in 2025), and the geographical distance is far, so Fujian candidates' willingness to apply is limited by regional preferences.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the benchmark of the significant ranking drop in 2025 due to major group adjustments, the downward pressure from a 50% enrollment expansion in 2026, the appeal of newly added popular engineering majors to high-scoring candidates, and the intensified competition from an approximately 6% increase in Fujian Physics Category candidates, considering the corrective effect of major optimization on rankings, the predicted minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 is about 49,144, with a range of 48,644 to 49,644.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Electrical Engineering and Automation
- Computer Science and Technology (Sino-American 121 Dual Degree Program)
- Internet of Things Engineering.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Mechanical Design, Manufacturing and Automation
- Food Science and Engineering Category
- Water Conservancy Category
- Biological Sciences Category.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- New Energy Science and Engineering
- Pharmaceutical Engineering
- Animal Science (Sino-American 121 Dual Degree Program).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 48,644 to 49,644, it is recommended to primarily fill Tier 2 majors, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 48,600), focus on aiming for popular engineering majors such as Electrical Engineering and Automation and Internet of Things Engineering. If the ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (e.g., around 49,600), prioritize Tier 3 majors as safety options. Note that the Sino-American 121 Dual Degree Program requires studying abroad, and candidates who are not English language learners should consider carefully.

prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次因中美121项目而大幅后移的基准、2026年缩招33%带来的位次前移压力、2026年取消中美121项目后恢复正常专业招生（工商管理类、金融学类各3人）对位次的回调作用、以及福建省历史类考生增加约6.4%带来的竞争加剧，考虑专业回归正常对位次的显著回调，预测2026年历史类最低位次约12042名，区间11542–12542名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were approximately 3331 → 3332 → 3075 → 3626 → 15677. Rankings were stable in the 3000–3600 range from 2021 to 2024. In 2025, due to the addition of Business Administration (Sino-American 121 Dual Degree Program), the minimum ranking dropped to about 15677, moving back by approximately 12051 positions compared to 2024. The university's enrollment plan for History Category in Fujian: 5 students in 2021, 5 in 2022, 5 in 2023, 5 in 2024, 9 in 2025; the 2026 plan reduces to 6 students, a 33% decrease from 2025, indicating a significant reduction, which puts upward pressure on rankings (increased competition).

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 120th in the 2026 Soft Science ranking, with stable tier; reputation in 2026 is neutral/mixed, with average Douyin popularity (overall rank 95), no significant negative public opinion or record of ranking drops, and stable application psychology. Food Science and Engineering (A-) is the university's only A- discipline, but the History Category majors (Business Administration, Finance) do not directly correspond, so the advantage of this discipline has limited impact on History Category applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2026, major popularity shows Finance/Financial/Economics categories as diverging and wait-and-see, while Business Administration/Business Management categories are clearly discouraged. The estimated number of History Category examinees in Fujian in 2026 is about 64,100, an increase of approximately 6.4% from 60,252 in 2025, leading to intensified competition. Northeast Agricultural University is located in Heilongjiang, with a very low enrollment proportion in Fujian (about 0.45% in 2025), and the geographical distance limits the willingness of Fujian History Category examinees to apply, influenced by regional preferences.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant backward shift in 2025 rankings due to the Sino-American 121 program, the upward pressure on rankings from a 33% enrollment reduction in 2026, the correction effect from canceling the Sino-American 121 program in 2026 and returning to normal major enrollment (3 students each in Business Administration and Finance), and the increased competition from a 6.4% rise in Fujian History Category examinees, with the significant correction from returning to normal majors, the predicted minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 is approximately 12,042, with a range of 11,542–12,542.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Finance (including Finance, International Economics and Trade).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Business Administration (including Business Administration, Accounting, Marketing, Human Resource Management).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- No other History Category majors available; in 2026, only two majors are offered: Finance and Business Administration, each with 3 students.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 11,542–12,542, with only two History Category majors, it is recommended to aim for Finance as a reach target and Business Administration as a safe choice. Candidates with rankings significantly better than the lower bound (e.g., within 11,500) should prioritize Finance; those near the upper bound (e.g., around 12,500) should use Business Administration as a backup. Note that Business Administration does not admit candidates with monochromatic color recognition deficiency.
